## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / new tool
- [ ] Refactor / domain extraction

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (all tests)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run build:plugin` passes (if plugin changed)
- [ ] Changes are backward-compatible (existing tool signatures unchanged)
- [ ] New tools have `instance_id` support (if Studio-requiring)
